$comment: Design token file for the Breadcrumb container component
$description: The Breadcrumb container arranges a trail of Breadcrumb Item components in a horizontal row separated by a fixed gap. Six types (Default, Label in first, Label in last, Only icons, Overflow Default, Overflow Expanded) differ only in which items and labels are shown; the Overflow Expanded type wraps collapsed items onto multiple lines. All per-item anatomy (icon, label, chevron, colors, and the intra-item gap) belongs to the nested Breadcrumb Item component and is tokenized in breadcrumb-item.json — not duplicated here. This file holds only the container's own layout values.

gap.description: Horizontal gap between adjacent breadcrumb items in the trail - gap.2 - 8px

direction.description: Items are laid out in a horizontal row

wrap.description: Items reflow onto additional lines when the trail exceeds the container width - used by the Overflow Expanded type; other types stay on a single line
